research.product: Dynatrace SLO Management API (latest service-level objectives)
research.interface: /platform/slo/v1/slos with optimistic-locking-version updates and evaluation:start / evaluation:poll — current Dynatrace platform; classic /api/v2/slo distinguished and rejected

official_sources.title: SLO Service Public API | Dynatrace Docs
official_sources.used_for: the latest SLO endpoint family: GET/POST /slos, GET/PUT/DELETE /slos/{id}, POST /slos/evaluation:start, GET /slos/evaluation:poll, POST /slos/evaluation:cancel, plus objective templates

official_sources.title: dynatrace-configuration-as-code-core clients/slo/slo.go (official Dynatrace source)
official_sources.used_for: the exact base path platform/slo/v1/slos; list pagination via the page-key query parameter with the nextPageKey response field and the {slos: [...]} page shape; update/delete requiring the optimistic-locking-version query parameter taken from the version field of the immediately preceding GET

official_sources.title: dynatrace-oss/dtctl sdk/api/slo/slo.go (official Dynatrace OSS source)
official_sources.used_for: the SLO wire fields (id, name, description, version, criteria[{timeframeFrom,timeframeTo,target,warning}], tags, customSli, externalId); list response {slos, totalCount, nextPageKey} with page-key/page-size parameters; POST /platform/slo/v1/slos/evaluation:start with body {id}; GET /platform/slo/v1/slos/evaluation:poll with the evaluation-token query parameter; the EvaluationResponse fields definition/evaluationResults/evaluationToken/ttlSeconds and result rows {criteria, status, value, errorBudget, message} with statuses like SUCCESS/FAILURE/WARNING/PENDING and criteria strings like 'now-7d -> now'

official_sources.title: Service-level objectives API (classic) - GET all SLOs | Dynatrace Docs
official_sources.used_for: the classic API family this client must distinguish and reject: GET https://{environment-id}.live.dynatrace.com/api/v2/slo with the slo.read Api-Token scope

official_sources.title: Access platform APIs from outside | Dynatrace Developer
official_sources.used_for: platform APIs are served from https://{environment-id}.apps.dynatrace.com and authenticate with 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' obtained via the OAuth client-credentials flow

research.language_rationale: The SLO gate runs inside our .NET 10 release pipeline. Dynatrace ships no official .NET SDK for the platform SLO service (its official clients for this API are Go, as referenced above), so idiomatic HttpClient with an injectable HttpMessageHandler against the documented /platform/slo/v1 REST contract is the credible integration surface.

verified_facts: The latest SLO service lives at /platform/slo/v1/slos on the {environment-id}.apps.dynatrace.com platform host with OAuth bearer auth; the classic SLO API is a different interface at /api/v2/slo on {environment-id}.live.dynatrace.com with Api-Token auth (slo.read scope).
Listing pages with page-size/page-key query parameters; a page answers {slos, totalCount, nextPageKey} and the follow-up request carries the page-key cursor.
Updates PUT /platform/slo/v1/slos/{id} with the optimistic-locking-version query parameter whose value is the version field returned by the immediately preceding GET of that SLO.

An SLO definition carries name, description, customSli (a DQL indicator), criteria rows {timeframeFrom, timeframeTo, target, warning}, tags and optional externalId; latest SLOs express the SLI as a single DQL query.

Evaluation is asynchronous: POST /platform/slo/v1/slos/evaluation:start with {id} answers evaluationResults plus, while unfinished, an evaluationToken (with ttlSeconds); GET /platform/slo/v1/slos/evaluation:poll?evaluation-token=... fetches progress until no row is PENDING.
Evaluation rows carry criteria (e.g. 'now-7d -> now'), status (SUCCESS/FAILURE/WARNING/PENDING), value, errorBudget and message.
